<!-- A change to a rule, example, or skill follows the TDD-for-docs loop in CONTRIBUTING.md.
     RED before GREEN: show the failure first. -->

## What this changes

## Why (the failure it fixes)

## Checklist

- [ ] New/changed behavior has a pressure scenario in `docs/superpowers/testing/scenarios.md`.
- [ ] Baseline failure recorded **verbatim** in `baseline-results.md`.
- [ ] Re-run with the skill injected; flip recorded in `verify-results.md`.
- [ ] Rationalizations table updated; provenance line is honest about observed vs. predicted.
- [ ] If a rule wouldn't take, I checked the **example** before adding more rules.
- [ ] SKILL.md still under ~150 lines.
- [ ] No claim added that the transcripts don't support.

<!-- Docs/typo/install-only fixes: delete the checklist and just describe the change. -->
